{"problem_standardized_math":"Write a program that implements Algorithm 18.1, and use it to solve the optimization problem\n\\[\n\\begin{array}{ll}\n\\text{minimize} & e^{x_1x_2x_3x_4x_5}-\\dfrac{1}{2}(x_1^3+x_2^3+1)^2 \\\\\n\\text{subject to} & x_1^2+x_2^2+x_3^2+x_4^2+x_5^2-10=0, \\\\\n& x_2x_3-5x_4x_5=0, \\\\\n& x_1^3+x_2^3+1=0.\n\\end{array}\n\\]\nUse the starting point \\(x_0 = (-1.71,\\,1.59,\\,1.82,\\,-0.763,\\,-0.763)^T\\). The solution is \\(x^* = (-1.8,\\,1.7,\\,1.9,\\,-0.8,\\,-0.8)^T\\)."}
